segments.caption: The video opens with a fiery, abstract visual, transitioning into the bold red title 'Young Justice: Outsiders – Season 3 Crash Course' against a dark, glowing background. The scene shifts to a cosmic backdrop with Earth and Mars, overlaid with text stating 'Two years have passed since the team and the League vanquished the Reach.' A group of heroes, including a bald figure in a blue and red suit, a masked figure in black, and others, appear in a starry space setting, with text noting the team has grown and new leaders have emerged. The focus then narrows to a tense conversation between a bald man in an orange and green suit and a man in a Superman t-shirt, set against a starfield. The narrative continues with text declaring 'Meta-humans continue to be targets of villainous forces,' followed by a close-up of the bald man in the orange suit, now accompanied by a woman in a purple and blue armored suit with a glowing blue aura. A dramatic close-up reveals a young man’s eye glowing red, followed by a fiery, red-veined figure emerging from flames. The scene cuts to a spaceship flying through space, then to a red, fiery figure leaping through green smoke. The bald man and the woman in armor reappear, now in a high-tech room with holographic displays. The final shot shows a council of heroes seated at a table, including a blonde woman in a dark jacket with a choker, a hooded archer, and a man in a red suit with a lightning bolt, all appearing serious and focused.

segments.caption: The video opens with a live broadcast from the United Nations Meta-Human Summit, showing Garth, Ambassador of Atlantis, standing solemnly in a formal assembly hall. He wears a dark blue armored suit with glowing light-blue lines, and his expression is serious as he addresses the summit. The scene transitions to a title card: 'NIGHTWING INVESTIGATES THE META-HUMAN TRAFFICKING,' set against a cosmic backdrop with Earth and Mars. The narrative shifts to a dimly lit warehouse at night, where Nightwing, in his signature black suit with blue accents and a mask, confronts two young individuals emerging from large, transparent containment pods. He observes them with intense focus, then uses his high-tech gauntlet to scan a circular device on the ground, revealing holographic data including chemical analysis and a map. The scan reveals a flag with a golden eagle and a red, white, and green tricolor, suggesting a connection to a specific nation. The scene cuts to another live broadcast, this time featuring Queen Ilona and King Viktor, standing on a balcony. The Queen, with blonde hair and a light blue dress, waves to the crowd, while the King, in a red military-style uniform with gold epaulets and a blue sash, stands beside her. The broadcast is labeled 'King & Queen Concerned Over Child Abductions,' indicating a growing crisis tied to the trafficking investigation. The atmosphere shifts from diplomatic tension to covert investigation and then to royal concern, suggesting a broader conspiracy involving meta-humans and state-level involvement.

segments.caption: The video opens with a live news broadcast from Galaxy Broadcasting System, featuring Cat Grant reporting from Markovburg, Markovia. The broadcast transitions to a scene inside a grand hall with large windows, where a man in a dark coat and brown vest stands facing a woman in a white lab coat with glasses, suggesting a tense conversation. The narrative then cuts to a dramatic moment where a man in a white t-shirt is thrown through a door, landing in front of two figures: one in a red military uniform with a sword and another in a light blue shirt. The man in the white t-shirt appears injured, with red veins glowing on his arm, indicating a meta-human transformation. The scene transitions to a dimly lit industrial setting where masked figures in black tactical gear are seen, suggesting a covert operation. The final scene shows a nighttime outdoor gathering with string lights, where two men in formal attire—Markov, Brion (Prince) and Markov, Gregor (Crown Prince)—are identified via holographic overlays, holding glasses, indicating a social or diplomatic event. The atmosphere shifts from public reporting to covert investigation and then to a tense confrontation, culminating in a formal gathering, hinting at political intrigue and meta-human threats in Markovia.

segments.caption: The video opens with a dramatic explosion at night, erupting from the ground near a rocky cliff, sending flames and debris into the air. The scene quickly shifts to a formal outdoor gathering adorned with string lights, where a massive, fiery, rock-like creature emerges from the ground, its body glowing with molten energy. The creature, resembling a lava monster, roars as it rises, causing destruction. A muscular man in a black armored suit with glowing red veins—Markov, Brion (Prince)—emerges from the flames, confronting the creature. He is soon joined by a man in a red military uniform with gold epaulets and a blue sash—Frederick, Delamb—standing authoritatively as the creature collapses. The scene cuts to a close-up of Frederick, Delamb, who appears stern and commanding, speaking with resolve. A text overlay reveals: 'META-HUMANS ARE BANNED FROM MARKOVIA, EVEN PRINCE BRION.' The scene transitions to a cosmic title card with Earth and a red planet, followed by another text: 'TIGRESS MEETS THE GIRL THAT ALLOWED IN KING AND QUEEN MARKOV'S ASSASSIN.' The final scene shifts indoors to a dimly lit hallway, where a woman in a beige hooded outfit is confronted by a man in a green coat, who grabs her arm and holds a white object—possibly a medical device or evidence—while she looks alarmed. The atmosphere is tense, suggesting a covert or investigative moment.

The video transitions to a cosmic title card with Earth and Mars in the background, displaying the text: 'THE TEAM BRINGS OUR NEW META-TEENS BACK WITH THEM TO GET ANSWERS'. The final scene shows the woman in the beige hooded outfit and a blonde woman in a dark jacket standing in a sunlit park, engaged in a serious conversation, indicating a shift from the dark, supernatural events to a more grounded, investigative tone.

segments.caption: The video opens with a nighttime scene outside a suburban house, where three men stand in the driveway — one in a black jacket, another in a Superman t-shirt, and a third in a brown coat — suggesting a tense or investigative moment. The scene transitions to a surreal, alien landscape on New Genesis, featuring vibrant purple and blue flora and glowing trees. A group of four characters — a large man in a fur-lined green outfit, a robotic figure with green lights, a man in a teal and orange suit, and a woman in a black and pink outfit — stand together, seemingly in discussion. Suddenly, a large, muscular figure with orange skin and white loincloth bursts through the trees, pointing aggressively. The scene escalates as a group of armored, menacing figures — including one with a skull-like mask and glowing red eyes, another in red armor with a horned helmet, and a third in blue and white armor — appear, confronting the team. The skull-masked figure, identified as a leader, speaks with authority, while the red-armored figure stands beside him, both exuding menace. The lighting shifts from bright and natural in the park to dark and ominous in the warehouse, emphasizing the contrast between personal family drama and intense supernatural conflict.

The transformation culminates in a full-body suit of dark, angular armor with glowing red lines and a central red eye, indicating a complete metamorphosis into a cybernetic being. The scientists react with shock and horror as the newly transformed figure rises, his body now a fusion of flesh and machine, radiating an ominous red glow. segments.caption: The video opens with a chaotic, smoky graveyard scene where a figure in a dark hooded outfit is seen falling amidst green mist and debris, suggesting a violent or supernatural event. The scene quickly shifts to a close-up of a woman in a beige hooded outfit, her eyes glowing white with shock or power, as she looks upward in distress. The setting then transitions to a suburban house at dusk, where a woman in a dark hijab confronts a man in a dark jacket outside, their expressions tense. Inside, a group of heroes gathers on a porch, including a man in a white hoodie with a mechanical arm, who appears to be in pain or undergoing transformation. The focus narrows to the man in the white hoodie, now visibly injured with purple energy crackling across his body, as he screams in agony. A text overlay appears: 'THE TEAM FINDS OTHER-WORLDLY SOLUTIONS TO HEAL VICTOR,' indicating the central conflict. The scene cuts to a lab where a woman in a black and pink outfit with a red headband, identified as Viloet, holds a glowing red book, standing beside a man in a Superman t-shirt. They observe a woman in a white lab coat as a figure in a red and black suit, Victor Stone, is shown in a containment pod, his body glowing with purple energy and red lines, suggesting a cybernetic transformation. The final shot reveals Victor Stone seated in a high-tech chair, his body fully transformed with glowing blue and red energy, his face contorted in pain or power, as the team watches in shock.

segments.caption: The sequence opens with a close-up of Victor Stone, now partially cybernetic, his face illuminated by intense purple energy crackling across his skin and mechanical arm, indicating a painful transformation. He is seated in a high-tech chair within a sterile lab environment, his body convulsing as blue and purple energy surges through him. The camera cuts to a concerned Man in White Lab Coat, who watches the transformation with alarm, while a Woman in White Lab Coat stands beside him, covering her mouth in shock. Victor’s mechanical arm glows with blue energy, and his chest emits a bright light as he screams in agony. The energy intensifies, forming a glowing blue ring around his head and chest, culminating in a massive blue explosion that engulfs the lab. As the light fades, Victor’s face is shown with a new, glowing red eye on his forehead and a red circular device on his chest, signifying a complete cybernetic evolution. The scene ends with a cosmic title card displaying bold white text: 'THE LEAGUE DEVELOPS A CENTER FOR TRAFFICKED META-TEENS TO REHAB,' set against a backdrop of Earth and Mars, suggesting a broader narrative shift toward rehabilitation and societal response to meta-human crises.

segments.caption: The video opens with a live broadcast from Galaxy Broadcasting System, showing a bald man in an orange and green suit—identified as Aquaman/Justice League Co-Chair—speaking at a podium during a Justice League/S.T.A.R. Labs press conference in Taos on September 29 at 09:00 MDT. The scene transitions to a cosmic title card revealing that the League has discovered a major player in the meta-trafficking ring who may know the location of Brion’s missing sister. Next, a close-up of a futuristic black device labeled 'goggle goggles' appears, followed by a man with gray hair and a bat emblem on his shirt, who puts on the goggles. The scene shifts to a young man with dark hair putting on the same device, which activates with a purple light. His eyes then glow green as he views a digital map highlighting a route from Beverly Hills to Encino, passing near the Luther Grande Hotel. The video then cuts to a futuristic, purple-lit council chamber where several heroes, including a woman in a purple and blue armored suit (Miss Martian), are gathered around a glowing table. The camera focuses on a young man with dark hair, who appears to be in deep concentration, before cutting to a holographic display showing a man with a red eye and cybernetic enhancements—Victor Stone—standing in a lab, with a red energy surge emanating from his chest, indicating a transformation or power activation.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a menacing figure in a red and black armored suit with a glowing red eye, standing in a dimly lit, red-hued chamber, suggesting a villainous presence. The scene shifts to a spaceship interior where Superman, Wonder Woman, and a green-skinned warrior with horns are observing a holographic display, indicating a strategic mission. The camera then pulls back to reveal a massive, dark spaceship with red glowing engines flying through a vibrant nebula, emphasizing the scale of the threat. Inside, a group of heroes including a red-armored warrior with horns, a large orange-skinned warrior, and a dark-cloaked figure stand together, exuding determination. A close-up of the red-armored warrior reveals a confident, almost smug expression, hinting at a complex role. The spaceship activates a massive red energy field, engulfing the surrounding space, as Superman and Wonder Woman react with concern. The scene cuts to a prison-like facility with rows of glowing orange containment pods, each holding a silhouetted figure, suggesting captured meta-teens. Inside one pod, a young man with blue skin and a red beanie speaks to a girl with purple eyes, indicating a personal connection. The video then shows a high-tech chamber with a golden, glowing structure at its center, surrounded by heroes including a woman in a black and gold suit with a bat-like mask, who appears to be leading the group. A text overlay states, 'After saving many trafficked meta-teens, team members form a new team to instill hope,' providing narrative context. The final scenes shift to a bright, festive fair where a group of young heroes, including a green-skinned boy, a blue-skinned boy, and a boy in a Superman t-shirt, stand together, looking determined. The green-skinned boy’s expression turns serious, suggesting an impending challenge. The overall tone transitions from ominous and intense to hopeful and heroic, highlighting the formation of a new team dedicated to protecting the vulnerable.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a blonde woman with green eyes, wearing a brown and white outfit with a quiver of arrows on her back, standing in front of a brightly lit 'Candy' and 'Cold Drinks' stand, suggesting a fair or public event. The scene quickly shifts to a dark, star-filled space environment where a green-skinned young man in a red and white suit with a high collar and red gloves appears, looking serious and determined. The camera then pulls back to reveal a full group of diverse young heroes standing together in space, including a man in a yellow and red suit with a lightning bolt emblem, a blue-skinned figure in a dark suit, a man in a blue vest with a yellow 'S' emblem, a woman in a black and red suit with a yellow lightning bolt, a man in a dark green suit, a woman in a white and purple suit, a woman in a brown and black suit, and a large, muscular man in a blue and white armored suit. The group stands in front of a large, glowing vertical structure with blue light strips. Floating holographic news screens appear, displaying headlines: 'LUTHOR RESTRICTS LEAGUE ACTION PENDING U.N. REVIEW' with a bald man in a suit, 'BREAKING NEWS: ANTI-META RALLY ENDS IN VIOLENCE' showing a crowd, and 'LOCAL TEEN DISAPPEARS: META-TRAFFICKING SUSPECTED' with a young girl’s face. The green-skinned young man gestures toward the screens, his expression shifting from serious to a slight, confident smirk. The camera then focuses on a close-up of a dark-skinned man with a shaved head and a green and black suit, holding a large, futuristic weapon, looking concerned. The scene returns to the group, now with the green-skinned young man crossing his arms, standing confidently at the center, flanked by his teammates, including the man in the blue vest, the blue-skinned figure, the man in the yellow and red suit, the woman in the black and red suit, and the man in the dark green suit. The atmosphere is tense and focused, suggesting a critical moment of decision or confrontation as the team prepares to respond to the escalating global threats shown on the news screens.

The scene quickly shifts to a dramatic nighttime sky where a massive, dark alien spaceship descends, firing blue energy beams at a cityscape, while a group of heroes, including the Green-Skinned Young Man in Red and White Suit, the Woman in Black and Red Suit with Yellow Lightning Bolt, the Man in Blue Vest with Yellow 'S' Emblem, the Blue-Skinned Figure in Dark Suit, and the Man in Yellow and Red Suit with Lightning Bolt, stand defiantly on a rocky outcrop. The scene cuts to a massive alien mothership hovering over a futuristic city, with a smaller craft descending. The scene transitions to a high-tech command center where Batman, in his iconic black armored suit, stands beside Miss Martian, who is now in a purple and blue armored suit with a star emblem, both observing the unfolding events. The camera pans to show a group of heroes, including the Man in Blue Vest with Yellow 'S' Emblem, the Woman in Black and Red Suit with Yellow Lightning Bolt, the Green-Skinned Young Man in Red and White Suit, the Blue-Skinned Figure in Dark Suit, and the Man in Yellow and Red Suit with Lightning Bolt, standing together in a dark, rocky environment, ready for action. segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of Batman in a high-tech command center, his expression stern as he speaks, with glowing blue screens in the background. The scene cuts to a holographic projection of Miss Martian, her face illuminated in blue, appearing concerned and speaking with urgency. The camera then pulls back to reveal a group of heroes in the command center: Batman, Nightwing, and a young woman in a wheelchair (likely Oracle), all focused on the situation. The scene shifts to a dimly lit room where Gretchen Goode, an older woman with gray hair in a bun, wearing a dark blazer over a white shirt, is speaking to two young men — Garth in his blue and black Atlantean suit and the Man in Teal and Orange Suit — who stand attentively. The camera then shows a transparent wall, revealing the trio from the outside, as a red targeting box appears over them, indicating surveillance. The scene transitions to a chaotic, abstract environment with swirling golden and brown hues, where the three are shown being violently thrown through the air by an unseen force. segments.caption: The video opens with a dramatic, red-tinted close-up of Granny Goodness, her face contorted in rage, as she looms over a group of heroes, including the Bald Man in Purple and Blue Suit with Red 'X' and the Man in Red Suit with Lightning Bolt, who appear distressed and overwhelmed. The scene quickly shifts to a cosmic view, showing a massive, purple energy sphere with lightning crackling around it, floating in space amidst stars and planets, suggesting a powerful interstellar threat. A text overlay declares, 'VICTOR AND THE OUTSIDERS ARE THE ONLY HEROES LEFT TO STOP GRANNY GOODNESS,' emphasizing the dire stakes. The focus then turns to Victor Stone, now fully cybernetic with a glowing red eye and red energy lines across his face, standing in a high-tech environment with neon data streams behind him. He activates a holographic display, revealing a red-outlined target: a large industrial container marked '16' in a dimly lit warehouse. The scene cuts to the warehouse, where Victor and the Outsiders—comprising the Woman in Black and Red Suit with Yellow Lightning Bolt, the Man in Yellow and Red Suit with Lightning Bolt, the Blue-Skinned Figure in Dark Suit, the Green-Skinned Young Man in Red and White Suit, and the Man in Blue Vest with Yellow 'S' Emblem—gather around a massive, red-eyed mechanical device. The Man in Yellow and Red Suit with Lightning Bolt speaks urgently, gesturing with his hand, while Victor, now with a mechanical arm, stands resolute, leading the team as they prepare for confrontation. The atmosphere is tense, with green and red lighting casting an ominous glow over the industrial setting, underscoring the urgency of their mission to stop Granny Goodness.

segments.caption: The sequence opens in a dimly lit industrial warehouse with a red-tinged atmosphere, where a group of heroes — including the Green-Skinned Young Man in Red and White Suit, the Man in Yellow and Red Suit with Lightning Bolt, the Woman in Black and Red Suit with Yellow Lightning Bolt, and the Man in Blue Vest with Yellow 'S' Emblem — stand alert as a massive, red-eyed mechanical device looms overhead. Suddenly, the Man in Blue Vest with Yellow 'S' Emblem is violently thrown backward by an explosion, his body contorted mid-air. The scene shifts to a surreal, neon-blue digital environment where Victor Stone, now fully cybernetic with red energy lines and a central red eye, stands in a high-tech corridor. He appears to be in pain, clutching his chest, as a towering robotic figure with pink energy lines and red eyes looms behind him. Victor Stone then activates his powers, his mechanical arm glowing with red energy, and he unleashes a powerful pink energy blast that engulfs the robot. The scene cuts back to the warehouse, where an older man in a dark suit — identified as Gretchen Goode / 'Granny Goodness' — stands with a furious expression, his face illuminated by green and red light. The heroes regroup, with the Woman in Black and Red Suit with Yellow Lightning Bolt holding a golden lasso, ready for combat, as the group prepares to confront the threat.

segments.caption: The sequence opens in a dimly lit, green-hued chamber where Victor Stone, the Young Man with Glowing Red Eye, stands beside a blue-skinned figure, likely a teammate, as they confront a looming threat. Suddenly, a massive explosion erupts, engulfing the scene in fiery orange and yellow light, revealing a bald man in a suit—Granny Goodness—whose face is contorted in rage as he unleashes a powerful energy blast. The camera cuts to a wide shot of the chamber, now bathed in red light, as the energy beam strikes the ground, creating a fiery vortex. The scene shifts to a close-up of Granny Goodness, his face illuminated by red lightning, screaming in fury. The environment then transitions to a surreal, pink-lit space where a woman in a hijab, Viloet, appears with glowing purple eyes, projecting a beam of energy. She is joined by a muscular man in a purple and black armored suit, who stands resolute. The energy intensifies, forming a rainbow-colored vortex that engulfs the chamber. The scene culminates in a cosmic view, with a massive golden structure descending through a vibrant nebula, surrounded by planets and stars, suggesting a grand, interstellar confrontation is unfolding.

segments.caption: The video opens in a modern, high-tech command center with large windows overlooking a cityscape, where a green-skinned young man in a red and white suit (Green-Skinned Young Man in Red and White Suit) is seen in close-up, smiling slightly, while a blonde woman in a black top and red pants (Woman in Black and Red Suit with Yellow Lightning Bolt) stands in the background. The scene shifts to a wider view of the command center, revealing a group of heroes, including a man with a red glowing eye (Victor Stone) and a woman with white skin and red eyes (White-Skinned Woman with Red Eyes), gathered around a central table. The focus then moves to a live news broadcast from Galaxy Broadcasting System, with anchor Tod Donner reporting from New York. The broadcast initially shows Victor Stone with the headline 'CYBORG JOINS OUTSIDERS,' then cuts to a red-tinted image of a woman with white hair and red eyes (Gretchen Goode / 'Granny Goodness') screaming, with the headline 'GRETCHEN GOODE UNDER SUSPICION.' The scene returns to the command center, where the Green-Skinned Young Man and a woman in a dark hijab (Woman in Dark Hijab) watch the news with concern. A cosmic title card appears, stating 'THE LIGHT START A PROXY WAR IN MARKOVIA, RELYING ON THEIR OWN MOLE, TERRA MARKOV.' The broadcast then shows pre-recorded footage from Markovburg, Markovia, with a large, stone-faced man (Baron Bedlam) and the headline 'BEDLAM STAGES COUP,' followed by a live report identifying him as Frederick De Lamb. The scene transitions to space, showing the Watchtower orbiting Earth, then to a dark chamber where a blonde woman in a dark jacket (Blonde Woman in Dark Jacket) and a man in a red suit with a lightning bolt (Man in Red Suit with Lightning Bolt) observe a holographic display of Lex Luthor. The final shot is a close-up of the two, with the woman arms crossed and the man looking stern, both focused on the display.

segments.caption: The video opens with a sweeping aerial view of Markovburg at night, illuminated by city lights and a dramatic sky, with a bridge leading to a fortified island and a large castle-like structure, timestamped February 16, 01:33 EET. The scene cuts to a high-tech command center, the Futuristic Council Chamber, where Miss Martian, in her purple and blue armored suit with a star emblem, stands at the center, flanked by other heroes including a blonde woman in a black and white suit and a young man in a blue and yellow suit, all focused on their holographic displays. The atmosphere is tense and strategic. The scene shifts to a dark graveyard where masked figures in black suits with red glowing eyes are digging a grave, suggesting a sinister ritual or burial. Next, the setting changes to Hollywood, timestamped February 15, 15:34 PST, where a group of masked operatives, including a blonde woman with a quiver of arrows and a man in a black mask, are preparing for action. The scene transitions to a nighttime cliffside where three heroes—Victor Stone (cybernetic with red energy lines and a central red eye), a winged figure, and a dark-skinned man in a green suit—stand ready for confrontation. A bald man in a suit, identified as Lex Luthor, appears in a high-tech room, projecting a holographic map of the castle in Markovburg, with a red dot indicating a target. He is joined by a man with white hair and an eyepatch, who speaks with intensity. The hologram then shows a group of heroes, including Miss Martian, in a blue energy field, suggesting teleportation or a strategic deployment. The final scenes show Batman and Nightwing in a command center, observing a holographic display of a container marked '16' on a digital map, while a stern-faced man with long dark hair, possibly a villain, appears on a screen, indicating a high-stakes confrontation is imminent. The environment shifts from urban to high-tech to natural, with lighting ranging from dark and moody to bright and digital, emphasizing the escalating tension and global scale of the conflict.

segments.caption: The segment opens in a high-tech command center with a cool blue ambiance, where a man with white hair and an eyepatch, wearing a black tactical suit with brown shoulder armor and dual katanas, stands beside a bald man in a dark suit and tie, both observing a holographic display. The display shows multiple figures, including a woman with dark hair and a golden headpiece, a man with a red eye, and another with a white face and red eyes, suggesting a strategic briefing or surveillance operation. The scene then cuts to a nighttime outdoor setting, where three heroes stand on a floating rock over a body of water, with a cityscape and castle in the background under a starry sky. One hero, a young man with white hair and a black suit, is shown in close-up with a determined expression. The scene shifts to a graveyard where a large, stone-like creature with glowing red eyes roars aggressively. A hero in a green and black suit with a headband, identified as the Man in Green and Black Suit, confronts the creature, generating a fiery energy sphere in his hands. He is joined by a man in a red cap and tactical vest, who appears to be communicating via headset. The fiery sphere is unleashed, engulfing the creature in flames. The final shot reveals a young man with green skin, black hair, and green eyes, wearing a white and red suit with a high collar, standing in a stone archway with a serious expression, suggesting he is observing or reacting to the events unfolding.

segments.caption: The sequence opens in a dark, eerie graveyard at night, where a confrontation unfolds between the Man in Green and Black Suit, who generates a fiery energy sphere, and a large, stone-like creature with glowing red eyes. The Man in Red Cap and Tactical Vest stands nearby, observing. The scene shifts to a wide shot showing the Green-Skinned Young Man in Red and White Suit standing over the defeated stone creature, with statues and a starry sky in the background. The focus then moves to the Blonde Woman in Dark Jacket, who appears concerned and tense, her expression shifting as she observes the situation. The Green-Skinned Young Man turns, revealing a determined look, and the camera pans to show the Man with White Hair and Eyepatch, who stands with dual katanas, his expression stern. The scene cuts to a close-up of the Blonde Woman, now with a more resolute expression, as she raises her hand, possibly preparing to act. The camera then shows the Man with White Hair and Eyepatch again, followed by a shot of the Bald Man in Dark Suit, who stands beside him, both facing a large holographic projection of Baron Bedlam’s face, which is displayed in red light with a castle image below. The final frame is a cosmic title card with Earth and Mars in the background, displaying white text: 'BRION IS BESTED BY HIS RAGE AND MURDERS BEDLAM, AND IS KICKED OFF OF THE OUTSIDERS,' indicating a pivotal narrative development.

segments.caption: The video opens with a fiery explosion in a nighttime outdoor setting, followed by a close-up of a man in a dark suit and glasses, who appears to be shouting. The scene shifts to a bearded man in a light blue shirt and suspenders, raising his arm triumphantly as the text 'Hail Brion the King!' appears on screen. A group of people, including a woman with red hair and a man in a green headband, cheer and raise their arms in celebration. The mood turns tense as the man in the suit and the man in the green headband look on with serious expressions. The scene transitions to a wide shot of a nighttime cliffside where a group of heroes, including a man in a green and black suit and a large armored figure, stand in formation. The setting then shifts to a high-tech command center where a bald man in a dark suit and a man with white hair and an eyepatch observe a holographic news broadcast from the Galaxy Broadcasting System, showing a pre-recorded report dated February 16. The bald man gestures as he speaks, and the scene cuts to a cosmic title card reading 'THE LIGHT, DARKSEID, AND METRON FORMULATE THEIR NEXT PLANS' against a backdrop of Earth and Mars. The video then shows a snowy mountain range in Western Mongolia, followed by a live news broadcast from New York featuring a man with a beard and glasses, identified as 'Black Lightning,' with the headline 'LIGHTNING AUTHOR IS META-TRAFFICKER.' The final scene is a high-tech chamber where a bald man in a dark suit stands before a curved window, facing a group of figures including a woman with blonde hair and a man with a white face and red eyes, all observing the situation with serious expressions.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of King Viktor, seated on a golden throne, wearing a regal crown and a white fur-lined cloak adorned with gold insignias, his expression stern as he listens to a man in a dark suit and glasses standing beside him. The scene cuts to a futuristic command center where the same man in the suit appears on a glowing blue holographic screen, his face tense and serious. The focus shifts to a muscular man with long dark hair and a scarred face, wearing a dark blue coat with a red collar, who stands in the command center, glaring intensely as he observes the holographic display showing multiple figures, including a bald man in a suit and a woman with a golden headpiece. The scene transitions to a cosmic setting with a red nebula backdrop, where a massive, armored figure with glowing red eyes and a dark, rocky body stands beside the scarred man, who turns to face him. The armored figure, identified as a powerful entity, is shown in a close-up with a fierce expression, then the scene cuts to a dramatic moment where a smaller figure is suspended in mid-air, being struck by red lightning from the armored figure’s hands. The scarred man watches with a grim expression as the armored figure turns away. The scene returns to the command center, where the scarred man stands before the holographic display, now showing a group of figures including a woman with a golden headpiece and a bald man in a suit. The video then shifts to a dark, starry space environment, where a hooded figure in a dark cloak stands with their back to the camera, facing a holographic projection of a woman in a dark hijab, with on-screen text reading 'THE WATCHTOWER FEBRUARY 24, 19:00 EST'. The final scenes show a woman in a purple and blue armored suit, glowing with a blue aura, sitting in a high-tech chair as an explosion erupts behind her, followed by a close-up of her face, now illuminated with a blue energy ring, her eyes glowing orange as she looks determinedly forward.

segments.caption: The video opens with a close-up of a cybernetic figure, identified as Victor Stone, seated in a high-tech, angular throne-like chair with glowing blue energy lines, set against a fiery, cavernous backdrop with molten rock and floating debris. His face is pale with red eyes, a red circular device on his forehead, and a red target emblem on his chest; he appears to be in deep concentration or pain, clutching his chest. The camera pulls back to reveal his full form in a blue and black armored suit, with his hands clasped over his chest as he speaks with a strained expression. The scene cuts to a group of three young heroes—two women and a man—running toward him through the rocky, lava-filled environment, their expressions urgent. The focus returns to Victor Stone’s intense, glowing face as he continues to speak. A text overlay appears: 'THE LEAGUE AND TEAM RECUPERATE AFTER LEARNING THE SECRETS THEY KEPT FROM EACH OTHER,' set against a cosmic background with Earth and Mars. The scene shifts to a high-tech, blue-lit corridor where Nightwing, in his black and blue tactical suit with a mask, stands with a stern expression. He is joined by Batman, in his classic black armored suit with a bat emblem, and another figure in a blue and black suit with a yellow lightning bolt emblem, who walks toward them. The camera focuses on Nightwing’s determined face as he speaks, suggesting a tense confrontation or strategic discussion is underway.

segments.caption: The video segment opens with Nightwing, in his black tactical suit with blue bat emblem and white eyes under his mask, standing in a high-tech, blue-lit corridor, looking stern and focused. The scene cuts to a starry space environment where a bald man in an orange and green suit with mechanical shoulder attachments stands beside Wonder Woman, who wears a red and gold armored suit with a tiara and star emblem; both appear serious and engaged in conversation. The focus shifts to Miss Martian, a woman with dark hair in a purple and blue armored suit with a star emblem, glowing with a blue aura, who appears as a hologram or distant figure. The scene returns to the blue-lit corridor, now showing Batman, in his black armored suit with bat emblem, standing beside Nightwing, both looking intense. A new character, Black Lightning, a man with a beard and orange-tinted glasses, wearing a blue and black suit with a yellow lightning bolt emblem, enters the frame, speaking with authority. The scene cuts back to Wonder Woman, who speaks with determination. A holographic display then shows Batman and Nightwing in the Batcave, while Black Lightning continues to speak, now with Batman and Nightwing behind him. The final shot reveals a group of three young heroes in space: a blonde woman in a brown and black suit with a yellow belt, a hooded archer in a black and orange suit with a quiver of arrows, and a dark-skinned woman in a gray and black suit with purple glowing lines, all standing together with serious expressions.

Behind him, Batman, in his iconic black armored suit with a bat emblem, and Nightwing, in his black tactical suit with blue accents and a mask, stand stoically, observing. The scene cuts to a different group: a green-skinned young man in a red and white sleeveless suit with a high collar, holding a green medical brace on his arm, stands beside a young man in a yellow and red suit with a red lightning bolt emblem and red goggles, who smiles confidently with hands on hips. The camera returns to Black Lightning, who continues speaking with growing intensity, his mouth open mid-sentence, as Batman and Nightwing remain impassive in the background. The lighting remains cool and blue, emphasizing the futuristic, high-tech environment. The segment ends with a purple screen displaying the 'HBO Max' logo in white, with copyright text below.
